scripts.smoke:chat: curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:4001/api/chat-sessions -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"agentSpec":{"identity":{"name":"Research Agent","description":"Research companies and summarize findings.","persona":"Clear, concise research partner"},"model":{"provider":"openai-compatible","name":"gpt-5","apiEndpoint":"https://api.openai.com/v1"},"systemPrompt":"You are a careful research assistant.","apps":[{"id":"browser","enabled":true,"configSummary":"Web research"}],"skills":[{"id":"company-research","enabled":true}],"abilities":[{"id":"web-research","enabled":true}]},"title":"Research Agent"}'
